title: VIDEO TITLE HERE - Use POWER WORDS + TOPIC + CONSEQUENCE
hook: Opening hook sentence - Most shocking fact first, never start with 'In this video...'

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: Hook + tease what viewer will learn + call to subscribe. Use 'you' and 'we'. Short sentences under 20 words.
sections.visual_cue: Show main image/chart/map related to topic

sections.title: Background/Context
sections.content: Explain background with simple analogies. Build credibility with specific numbers and dates. One idea per paragraph.

sections.title: Main Analysis
sections.content: Core content broken into 3-4 sections. Each section: Fact → Explanation → Impact. Add 'Here's what most people don't realize...' every 3-4 minutes.
sections.visual_cue: News footage, data charts, expert quotes

sections.title: Economic Impact
sections.content: Connect to money: inflation, stocks, oil, dollar, gold, crypto. 'This is what smart money is doing right now...'
sections.visual_cue: Stock charts, price graphs, investment imagery

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.content: Key takeaways summary + subscribe CTA + tease next video. 'If you found this analysis helpful...'
sections.visual_cue: Summary points on screen, subscribe button animation

thumbnail_prompt: Generate YouTube thumbnail: dark dramatic background, [SPECIFIC ELEMENTS], bold text '[2-3 WORDS]' in bright yellow at bottom, cinematic lighting, high contrast, professional news channel style, 1280x720 resolution
target_audience: 25-55 year old Americans interested in world affairs and finance
disclaimer: For educational and informational purposes only. Not investment advice.
